hyperedges.label: Sage Insight Consumer Triad (Oracle, Guardian, Architect)
Risk Enforcement Layer (hard_rules + Commander circuit breaker + Settings limits)
Trade Execution Pipeline: signal approval -> TraderAgent -> KrakenExecutor -> DB + bus
Redis atlas:events Fan-Out: all API routers and WS endpoint share one stream key
Position Risk Management: Kelly sizing + stop-loss/take-profit monitoring + paper gate
WebSocket Real-Time Event Pipeline (useWebSocket → useAtlasStore → UI components)
Agent Chat Pattern (AgentChat + MasterTerminal share session-ID chat over WS + REST)
Paper-to-Live Trading Gate (PaperReadiness thresholds gate live trading enablement)

nodes.label: Run Freqtrade backtests via Docker SDK.
Extract key metrics from Freqtrade backtest JSON.
Evaluate whether to advance the signal through the pipeline.
Commander alert manager — creates DB alerts and publishes to the dashboard.
Hard rule validators — no LLM, pure logic.
Fetch FreqAI predictions from the running Freqtrade instance.
Abstract BaseAgent — all 6 agents extend this.
Main agent work loop — scheduled tasks, polling, etc.
Load common context injected into every agent's prompts.
Async SQLAlchemy engine and session factory.
Kraken REST API wrapper using python-kraken-sdk.
Thin wrapper around python-kraken-sdk for spot/margin trading.
Place an order. validate=True for paper trading (no real execution).
Redis Streams message bus — fan-out to all agent consumer groups.
OpenRouter client — OpenAI-compatible API with retry and cost tracking.
Trader Kraken execution layer — places and monitors orders.
Calculate position size using Kelly criterion + risk limits.
Agent control, status, and individual chat routes.
SSE stream of chat responses for a session.
User manually approve or reject a pending signal.
Tell Architect to generate a new strategy.
Route a message to a specific agent using @name prefix, or Commander by default.
SSE stream of all agent decisions and status updates.
Signal Trader agent to close this position immediately.
WebSocket connection manager — broadcasts all Atlas events to dashboard clients.
WebSocket endpoint — streams all Atlas bus events to authenticated clients.
